steps.title: Evaluate Statement I — compare the means
steps.content:
Foothill mean: $$\frac{87+80+75+76+70}{5}=\frac{388}{5}=77.6$$
Valley mean: $$\frac{44+54+65+76+82}{5}=\frac{321}{5}=64.2$$
77.6 > 64.2, so Statement I is true.

steps.title: Evaluate Statement II — compare the medians
steps.content:
Order each set to find the middle (3rd) value:
Foothill: 70, 75, 76, 80, 87 $\Rightarrow$ median = 76
Valley: 44, 54, 65, 76, 82 $\Rightarrow$ median = 65
76 > 65, so Statement II is true.

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content:
• A (I only): Statement I is true, but Statement II is also true. Eliminated.
  • B (II only): Statement II is true, but Statement I is also true. Eliminated.
  • C (I and II): Both statements are true. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D (Neither I nor II): Both are true. Eliminated.
As a fast Desmos check, store each row as a list and compare the means and medians directly.
